NestedWGCNA

Source: R/NestedWGCNA-package.R
NestedWGCNA-package.Rd

Two-stage gene co-expression network analysis with coarse-grained and fine-grained module discovery.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://dai540.github.io/NestedWGCNA
